101010111011110011111110100100001100100010001001010110110000000 - ASI: 27

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  101 = 1 * 01
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0100 = 01 * 00
  0110 = 01 * 10
  0111 = 01 * 11
  1000 = 10 * 00
  1111 = 11 * 11
  10101 = 10 * 101
  011110 = 0111 * 10
  01000100 = 0100 * 0100
  01001000 = 0100 * 1000
  01100100 = 0110 * 0100
  01111111 = 0111 * 1111
  10000000 = 1000 * 0000
  10101101 = 10101 * 101
  101010111 = 10101 * 0111
  101010111011110 = 101010111 * 011110
  0110010001000100 = 01100100 * 01000100
  0111111101001000 = 01111111 * 01001000
  1010110110000000 = 10101101 * 10000000
  1010101110111100111111101001000 = 101010111011110 * 0111111101001000
  01100100010001001010110110000000 = 0110010001000100 * 1010110110000000
  101010111011110011111110100100001100100010001001010110110000000 = 1010101110111100111111101001000 * 01100100010001001010110110000000
